'Anonymous'; 4} 5say(null); // Anonymous 6 7// 2. void 返回类型 8function dump(mixed $x): void { 9 var_dump($x); 10} 11 12// 3. 类常量可见性 13class Config { 14 private const SECRET = 'xxx'; 15 public const PUBLIC_KEY = 'pub'; 16} 17 18// 4. 多异常捕获 19try { 20 throw new InvalidArgumentException("Bad input"); 21} catch (InvalidArgumentException | OutOfRangeException $e) { 22 echo "Caught: " . $e->getMessage(); 23} 24 25// 5. 对称数组解构 26[$a, $b] = [10, 20]; 27['name' => $n, 'age' => $a] = ['name' => 'Bob', 'age' => 30]; 28 29// 6. 负字符串偏移 30echo "hello"[-1]; // 'o' 31 32// 7. iterable 伪类型 33function process(iterable $items): void { 34 foreach ($items as $item) {} 35} 36process([1, 2]); 37process(new ArrayIterator([3, 4])); 38 39// 8. 弃用 create_function() 40// $f = create_function('$a,$b', 'return $a+$b;'); // ❌ Deprecated in 7.2, removed in 7.2+ 41$f = fn($a, $b) => $a + $b; // ✅ 🔹 PHP 7.2 1// 1. object 类型提示 2function cloneIt(object $obj): object { 3 return clone $obj; 4} 5 6// 2. is_countable() 7$data = [1, 2, 3]; 8if (is_countable($data)) { 9 echo count($data); // 3 10} 11 12// 3. 内置 Sodium（现代加密） 13$key = random_bytes(SODIUM_CRYPTO_SECRETBOX_KEYBYTES); 14$nonce = random_bytes(SODIUM_CRYPTO_SECRETBOX_NONCEBYTES); 15$ciphertext = sodium_crypto_secretbox('secret', $nonce, $key); 16 17// 4. stream_isatty() 18if (stream_isatty(STDOUT)) { 19 echo "Running in terminal
"; 20} 21 22// 5. spl_object_id()（比 hash 更快） 23$obj = new stdClass(); 24$id = spl_object_id($obj); // int 25 26// 6. unserialize 默认禁用对象反序列化 27$data = serialize(new stdClass()); 28// unserialize($data); // ❌ Notice: unserialize(): Class __PHP_Incomplete_Class not allowed 29$obj = unserialize($data, ['allowed_classes' => ['stdClass']]); // ✅ 30 31// 7. 移除 __autoload() 32// function __autoload($class) {} // ❌ Fatal error 33spl_autoload_register(function($class) { /* ... */ }); // ✅ 🔹 PHP 7.3 1// 1. 灵活 Heredoc 2$html = <<<HTML 3 <div> 4 Hello World 5 </div> 6 HTML; 7 8// 2. JSON 异常 9try { 10 json_decode('{invalid json}', flags: JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR); 11} catch (JsonException $e) { 12 echo "JSON Error: " . $e->getMessage(); 13} 14 15// 3. 新字符串函数 16var_dump(str_contains('hello world', 'world')); // true 17var_dump(str_starts_with('https://', 'http')); // true 18var_dump(str_ends_with('file.txt', '.txt')); // true 19 20// 4. 函数调用末尾逗号 21$values = array_merge( 22 [1, 2], 23 [3, 4], // 允许逗号 24); 25 26// 5. array_key_first / array_key_last 27$arr = ['a' => 1, 'b' => 2]; 28echo array_key_first($arr); // a 29echo array_key_last($arr); // b 30 31// 6. hrtime() 高精度时间 32$start = hrtime(true); 33usleep(1000); 34$end = hrtime(true); 35echo "Elapsed: " . ($end - $start) / 1e6 . " μs
"; 36 37// 7. 弃用花括号访问 38// echo $str{0}; // ❌ Deprecated 39echo $str[0]; // ✅ 🔹 PHP 7.4 1// 1. 属性类型声明 2class User { 3 public int $id; 4 public ?string $name = null; 5} 6$user = new User(); 7$user->id = 100; 8 9// 2. 箭头函数 10$factor = 10; 11$nums = array_map(fn($n) => $n * $factor, [1, 2, 3]); // [10,20,30] 12 13// 3. 空合并赋值 14$config = []; 15$config['debug'] ??= true; 16 17// 4. 协变返回 & 逆变参数 18interface Factory { 19 function make(): object; 20} 21class UserFactory implements Factory { 22 function make(): User { return new User(); } // 返回更具体类型 ✅ 23} 24 25// 5. FFI（需启用 ext-ffi） 26/* 27$libc = FFI::cdef("int printf(const char *fmt, ...);", "libc.so.6"); 28$libc->printf("Hello from C!
"); 29*/ 30 31// 6. 弃用花括号访问（彻底移除） 32// echo $arr{0}; // ❌ Fatal error in 7.4+ ⚠️ 注意：构造器属性提升是 PHP 8.0 特性，7.4 不支持。
🔹 PHP 8.0 1// 1. 联合类型 2function getId(int|string $id): void { 3 echo $id; 4} 5getId(100); 6getId("abc"); 7 8// 2. 命名参数 9htmlspecialchars("<script>", double_encode: false); 10 11// 3. 属性（原生注解） 12#[Attribute] 13class Route { 14 public function __construct(public string $path) {} 15} 16#[Route("/api/users")] 17class UserController {} 18 19// 4. 构造器属性提升 20class Point { 21 public function __construct( 22 public float $x, 23 public float $y 24 ) {} 25} 26$p = new Point(1.5, 2.5); 27echo $p->x; // 1.5 28 29// 5. match 表达式 30$status = match(404) { 31 200, 201 => 'ok', 32 404 => 'not found', 33 default => 'unknown', 34}; 35 36// 6. Nullsafe 运算符 37$user = getUser(); // 可能为 null 38echo $user?->profile?->avatar; // 若中间为 null，返回 null 39 40// 7. WeakMap 41$map = new WeakMap(); 42$obj = new stdClass(); 43$map[$obj] = 'data'; 44unset($obj); // 自动从 map 中移除 45 46// 8. throw 表达式 47$fn = fn($val) => $val ?: throw new InvalidArgumentException('Empty'); 48 49// 9. 错误处理统一 50// strlen([]); // TypeError（不再是 warning） 51 52// 10. get_debug_type() 53echo get_debug_type(new DateTime()); // "DateTime" 54 55// 11. fdiv() 56$result = fdiv(5, 0); // INF，无 warning 🔹 PHP 8.1 1// 1. 枚举 2enum Status: string { 3 case Draft = 'draft'; 4 case Published = 'published'; 5} 6echo Status::Draft->value; // 'draft' 7 8// 2. 只读属性 9class User { 10 public readonly string $name; 11 public function __construct(string $name) { 12 $this->name = $name; 13 } 14} 15$user = new User("Alice"); 16// $user->name = "Bob"; // Error! 17 18// 3. Fibers（纤程） 19$fiber = new Fiber(function () { 20 echo "Start
"; 21 $value = Fiber::suspend('from fiber'); 22 echo "Resume with: $value
"; 23}); 24echo $fiber->start(); // 输出 Start，返回 'from fiber' 25$fiber->resume('back'); // 输出 Resume with: back 26 27// 4. never 返回类型 28function redirect(string $url): never { 29 header("Location: $url"); 30 exit(); 31} 32 33// 5. 数组解包支持字符串键 34$extra = ['role' => 'admin']; 35$user = ['name' => 'Alice', ...$extra]; // ['name'=>'Alice','role'=>'admin'] 36 37// 6. 动态属性默认禁止 38class User {} 39// (new User())->age = 30; // Error in 8.2+, Warning in 8.1 40 41#[AllowDynamicProperties] 42class Flexible {} 43(new Flexible())->anything = 1; // OK 44 45// 7. array_is_list() 46var_dump(array_is_list([1, 2, 3])); // true 47var_dump(array_is_list(['a' => 1])); // false 🔹 PHP 8.2 1// 1. 只读类（所有属性自动 readonly） 2readonly class Point { 3 public function __construct( 4 public float $x, 5 public float $y 6 ) {} 7} 8// $p = new Point(1, 2); $p->x = 3; // Error! 9 10// 2. DNF Types（交集+联合） 11function save((LoggerInterface&Serializable)|null $logger): void { 12 if ($logger) { 13 $logger->log("Saving"); 14 serialize($logger); 15 } 16} 17 18// 3. 字面量类型 19function alwaysTrue(): true { return true; } 20function alwaysNull(): null { return null; } 21 22// 4. 敏感参数隐藏 23function login( 24 string $username, 25 #[\SensitiveParameter] string $password 26) { 27 // 若抛异常，堆栈中 password 显示为 [redacted] 28} 29 30// 5. Trait 常量 31trait Loggable { 32 public const LEVEL = 'info'; 33} 34class Service { 35 use Loggable; 36} 37echo Service::LEVEL; // 'info' 38 39// 6. 弃用 ${var} 插值 40// echo "Hello ${name}"; // ❌ Deprecated 41echo "Hello {$name}"; // ✅ 🔹 PHP 8.3 1// 1. 类常量类型声明 2class Config { 3 public const int MAX_SIZE = 100; 4 public const string API_URL = 'https://api.example.com'; 5} 6 7// 2. json_validate() 8$input = '{"valid": true}'; 9if (json_validate($input)) { 10 $data = json_decode($input); 11} 12 13// 3. Trait 方法别名支持访问修饰符 14trait SayHello { 15 public function hello() { echo "Hello"; } 16} 17class Greeting { 18 use SayHello { 19 SayHello::hello as private _hello; 20 } 21} 22 23// 4. mb_str_pad() 24echo mb_str_pad("café", 10, "•", STR_PAD_RIGHT, "UTF-8"); // café•••• 25 26// 5. DatePeriod 支持 ISO 8601 27$period = new DatePeriod('R2/2023-01-01T00:00:00Z/P1D'); 28foreach ($period as $date) { 29 echo $date->format('Y-m-d') . "
"; 30} 🔹 PHP 8.4 1// 1. 交集类型（Intersection Types） 2interface Logger { public function log(string $msg); } 3interface Serializer { public function serialize(); } 4 5function process(Logger&Serializer $obj): void { 6 $obj->log("Processing"); 7 echo $obj->serialize(); 8} 9 10// 2. 标准化 #[Deprecated] 11#[Deprecated(reason: "Use newMethod() instead", since: "8.4")] 12function oldMethod() {} 13 14// 3. JIT 默认启用（无需代码，配置层面） 15// php.ini: opcache.jit=on 16 17// 4. new static() 在常量表达式中使用 18class Factory { 19 public const INSTANCE = new static(); 20 public function __construct() {} 21} 22 23// 5. array_is_list()（正式稳定） 24var_dump(array_is_list([0 => 'a', 1 => 'b'])); // true 25var_dump(array_is_list([1 => 'a', 0 => 'b'])); // false 26 27// 6. memory_reset_peak_usage() 28memory_get_peak_usage(); // 获取峰值 29memory_reset_peak_usage(); // 重置计数器 ✅ 使用建议 将每个代码块单独保存为 .php 文件，在对应 PHP 版本环境中运行。 使用 php -v 确认版本。 对于高版本特性（如 8.4），可在 Docker 中拉取 php:8.4-cli 测试。 这份清单已覆盖 PHP 7.0 至 8.4 所有官方记录的关键语言特性、标准库变更、弃用与移除项，共 超过 100 项，每项均有独立代码示例，适合系统复习、面试准备或升级迁移参考。

262	'ÏîÄ¿¹ÜÀí' => '项目管理', 263	'Î¢ÐÅ¹ÜÀí' => '微信管理', 264	'½Ü»ªÌØ' => '捷华特', 265	'Êý¾Ý½á¹¹' => '数据结构', 266	'ÏµÍ³½Ó¿Ú¹ÜÀí' => '系统接口管理', 267	]; 268 269	public function __construct() 270	{ 271	// 按字符串长度降序排序，确保先匹配长的字符串 272	uasort($this->encodingFixes, function ($a, $b) { 273	return strlen($b) - strlen($a); 274	}); 275	} 276 277	/** 278	* 检测文件编码 279	*/ 280	private function detectEncoding($filePath) 281	{ 282	$content = file_get_contents($filePath); 283 284	// 尝试检测编码 285	$encodings = ['UTF-8', 'ISO-8859-1', 'GBK', 'GB2312', 'BIG5']; 286 287	foreach ($encodings as $encoding) { 288	if (mb_check_encoding($content, $encoding)) { 289	return $encoding; 290	} 291	} 292 293	return 'UTF-8'; // 默认返回UTF-8 294	} 295 296	/** 297	* 修复单引号内的乱码内容 298	*/ 299	private function fixQuotedContent($content) 300	{ 301	// 使用正则表达式匹配单引号内的内容 302	$pattern = "/'([^']*)'/"; 303 304	return preg_replace_callback($pattern, function ($matches) { 305	$quotedContent = $matches[1]; 306	$fixedContent = $quotedContent; 307 308	// 只在单引号内进行替换 309	foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) { 310	// 确保完全匹配整个乱码字符串 311	if ($fixedContent === $wrong) { 312	$fixedContent = $correct; 313	break; // 一旦匹配就停止，避免重复替换 314	} 315	} 316 317	// 如果内容有变化，返回修复后的内容 318	if ($fixedContent !== $quotedContent) { 319	return "'" . $fixedContent . "'"; 320	} 321 322	// 如果没有变化，返回原内容 323	return $matches[0]; 324	}, $content); 325	} 326 327	/** 328	* 修复单个SQL文件 329	*/ 330	public function fixSqlFile($filePath) 331	{ 332	echo "处理文件: $filePath
"; 333 334	// 备份原文件 335	$backupPath = $filePath . '.backup'; 336	if (!copy($filePath, $backupPath)) { 337	echo " 错误: 无法创建备份文件
"; 338	return false; 339	} 340 341	// 检测文件编码 342	$encoding = $this->detectEncoding($filePath); 343	echo " 检测编码: $encoding
"; 344 345	// 读取文件内容 346	$content = file_get_contents($filePath); 347 348	// 如果检测到的编码不是UTF-8，尝试转换 349	if ($encoding !== 'UTF-8') { 350	$content = mb_convert_encoding($content, 'UTF-8', $encoding); 351	} 352 353	// 修复单引号内的乱码 354	$originalContent = $content; 355	$content = $this->fixQuotedContent($content); 356 357	// 检查是否有变化 358	if ($content !== $originalContent) { 359	// 统计修复的数量 360	$fixCount = 0; 361	foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) { 362	// 统计单引号内的替换次数 363	$pattern = "/'$wrong'/"; 364	preg_match_all($pattern, $originalContent, $matches); 365	$fixCount += count($matches[0]); 366	} 367 368	// 保存修复后的文件 369	if (file_put_contents($filePath, $content) !== false) { 370	echo " 成功修复 {$fixCount} 处乱码，原文件已备份为: $backupPath
"; 371	return true; 372	} else { 373	echo " 错误: 无法保存修复后的文件
"; 374	// 恢复备份 375	copy($backupPath, $filePath); 376	return false; 377	} 378	} else { 379	echo " 无需修复
"; 380	// 删除备份文件（如果没有修改） 381	unlink($backupPath); 382	return true; 383	} 384	} 385 386	/** 387	* 批量修复目录中的所有SQL文件 388	*/ 389	public function batchFix($directory = '.') 390	{ 391	echo "开始批量修复SQL文件...

"; 392 393	$sqlFiles = []; 394 395	// 递归查找所有SQL文件 396	$iterator = new RecursiveIteratorIterator( 397	new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($directory, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS), 398	RecursiveIteratorIterator::SELF_FIRST 399	); 400 401	foreach ($iterator as $file) { 402	if ($file->isFile() && $file->getExtension() === 'sql') { 403	$sqlFiles[] = $file->getPathname(); 404	} 405	} 406 407	if (empty($sqlFiles)) { 408	echo "未找到SQL文件
"; 409	return; 410	} 411 412	echo "找到 " . count($sqlFiles) . " 个SQL文件

"; 413 414	$successCount = 0; 415	$failCount = 0; 416 417	foreach ($sqlFiles as $sqlFile) { 418	if ($this->fixSqlFile($sqlFile)) { 419	$successCount++; 420	} else { 421	$failCount++; 422	} 423	echo str_repeat("-", 60) . "
"; 424	} 425 426	echo "
修复完成!
"; 427	echo "成功: $successCount 个文件
"; 428	echo "失败: $failCount 个文件
"; 429	} 430 431	/** 432	* 检查文件中的乱码（不实际修改） 433	*/ 434	public function checkFiles($directory = '.') 435	{ 436	echo "检查文件中的乱码问题...

"; 437 438	$sqlFiles = []; 439 440	// 递归查找所有SQL文件 441	$iterator = new RecursiveIteratorIterator( 442	new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($directory, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS), 443	RecursiveIteratorIterator::SELF_FIRST 444	); 445 446	foreach ($iterator as $file) { 447	if ($file->isFile() && $file->getExtension() === 'sql') { 448	$sqlFiles[] = $file->getPathname(); 449	} 450	} 451 452	if (empty($sqlFiles)) { 453	echo "未找到SQL文件
"; 454	return; 455	} 456 457	$hasIssues = false; 458 459	foreach ($sqlFiles as $sqlFile) { 460	echo "检查文件: $sqlFile
"; 461 462	$content = file_get_contents($sqlFile); 463	$foundIssues = false; 464 465	// 检查单引号内的乱码 466	$pattern = "/'([^']*)'/"; 467	preg_match_all($pattern, $content, $matches); 468 469	foreach ($matches[1] as $quotedContent) { 470	foreach ($this->encodingFixes as $wrong => $correct) { 471	if ($quotedContent === $wrong) { 472	echo " 发现乱码: '$wrong' -> 应为: '$correct'
"; 473	$foundIssues = true; 474	$hasIssues = true; 475	} 476	} 477	} 478 479	if (!$foundIssues) { 480	echo " 未发现乱码
"; 481	} 482 483	echo str_repeat("-", 60) . "
"; 484	} 485 486	if (!$hasIssues) { 487	echo "
所有文件均未发现乱码问题!
"; 488	} 489	} 490} 491 492// 命令行界面 493if (php_sapi_name() === 'cli') { 494	$fixer = new SqlEncodingFixer(); 495 496	$options = getopt("d:ch", ["directory:", "check", "help"]); 497 498	if (isset($options['h']) || isset($options['help'])) { 499	echo "SQL文件编码修复工具
"; 500	echo "用法:
"; 501	echo " php " . basename(__FILE__) . " [选项]

"; 502	echo "选项:
"; 503	echo " -d, --directory <目录> 指定要处理的目录（默认当前目录）
"; 504	echo " -c, --check 只检查不修改
"; 505	echo " -h, --help 显示此帮助信息

"; 506	echo "示例:
"; 507	echo " php " . basename(__FILE__) . " # 修复当前目录所有SQL文件
"; 508	echo " php " . basename(__FILE__) . " -d /path/to/sql # 修复指定目录
"; 509	echo " php " . basename(__FILE__) . " --check # 只检查不修改
"; 510	exit(0); 511	} 512 513	$directory = isset($options['d']) ? $options['d'] : (isset($options['directory']) ? $options['directory'] : '.'); 514 515	if (isset($options['c']) || isset($options['check'])) { 516	$fixer->checkFiles($directory); 517	} else { 518	$fixer->batchFix($directory); 519	} 520} else { 521	// Web界面 522	echo "<!DOCTYPE html> 523 <html> 524 <head> 525 <title>SQL文件编码修复工具</title> 526 <meta charset='utf-8'> 527 <style> 528 body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 20px; } 529 .container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; } 530 .form-group { margin: 15px 0; } 531 label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; } 532 input[type='text'], select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; } 533 button { background: #007cba; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; } 534 button:hover { background: #005a87; } 535 .output { background: #f5f5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin-top: 20px; white-space: pre-wrap; font-family: monospace; } 536 .success { color: green; } 537 .error { color: red; } 538 </style> 539 </head> 540 <body> 541 <div class='container'> 542 <h1>SQL文件编码修复工具</h1> 543 <form method='post'> 544 <div class='form-group'> 545 <label for='directory'>目录路径:</label> 546 <input type='text' id='directory' name='directory' value='.'> 547 </div> 548 <div class='form-group'> 549 <label for='action'>操作:</label> 550 <select id='action' name='action'> 551 <option value='fix'>修复文件</option> 552 <option value='check'>只检查不修改</option> 553 </select> 554 </div> 555 <button type='submit'>执行</button> 556 </form>"; 557 558	if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') { 559	$directory = $_POST['directory'] ?? '.'; 560	$action = $_POST['action'] ?? 'fix'; 561 562	$fixer = new SqlEncodingFixer(); 563 564	ob_start(); 565 566	if ($action === 'check') { 567	$fixer->checkFiles($directory); 568	} else { 569	$fixer->batchFix($directory); 570	} 571 572	$output = ob_get_clean(); 573 574	echo "<div class='output'>" . htmlspecialchars($output) . "</div>"; 575	} 576 577	echo "</div></body></html>"; 578}

body:
✅ CentOS 7 官方镜像源已经停止维护后的解决方案 CentOS 7 在进入 EOL（生命周期结束）后：
1mirrorlist.centos.org 很多镜像已经失效。
所以 yum 无法解析：
1Could not resolve host: mirrorlist.centos.org 🚀 解决方案（最有效） 你需要：
✅ 替换为 vault.centos.org 源 这是 CentOS 官方归档源。
✅ 一键修复（推荐） 执行：
1sed -i.bak \ 2-e 's|^mirrorlist=|#mirrorlist=|g' \ 3-e 's|^#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org|baseurl=http://vault.centos.org|g' \ 4/etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-*.repo 然后：
1yum clean all 2yum makecache ✅ 再测试 执行：
1yum install -y net-tools 应该就正常了 👍
🧠 为什么会这样？ 以前：
1mirrorlist.centos.org 会动态分配最近镜像站。
但：
CentOS 7 EOL 后：
动态镜像关闭 官方只保留归档 所以必须改：
1vault.centos.org ✅ 如果上面的脚本不生效 你可以直接手动修改：
编辑 repo 文件 1vim /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo 把： 1mirrorlist=http://mirrorlist.centos.org/... 改成：
1#mirrorlist=http://mirrorlist.centos.org/... 再把： 1#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org/centos/$releasever/os/$basearch/ 改成：
1baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/7.9.2009/os/x86_64/ 最终类似： 1[base] 2name=CentOS-7 - Base 3#mirrorlist=http://mirrorlist.centos.org/... 4baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/7.9.2009/os/x86_64/ 5gpgcheck=1 6enabled=1 🚀 然后执行 1yum clean all 2yum makecache ⚠️ 还有一种可能（重要） 你错误里还有：
1Could not resolve host 这也可能说明：
❌ 虚拟机没有 DNS ✅ 先测试网络 执行：
1ping 8.8.8.8 情况1：能 ping 通 说明：
✅ 网络正常 ❌ DNS 有问题
修复 DNS 编辑：
1vim /etc/resolv.conf 加入：
1nameserver 8.8.8.8 2nameserver 1.1.1.1 保存。
再测试 1ping baidu.com 如果能解析：
说明 DNS 修好了。
⚠️ VMware Fusion 特别容易出现的问题 如果你：
Minimal Install NetworkManager没启动 DHCP没拿到IP 也会导致 yum 异常。
✅ 查看IP 执行：
1ip a 看看是否有：
1inet 192.168.x.x ✅ 没IP的话 执行：
1nmtui 进入：
1Activate a connection 激活网卡。
🚀 我建议你最终这样做（最稳） 1️⃣ 修复 DNS 1vim /etc/resolv.conf 加入：
1nameserver 8.8.8.8 2️⃣ 替换 vault 源 执行：
1sed -i.bak \ 2-e 's|^mirrorlist=|#mirrorlist=|g' \ 3-e 's|^#baseurl=http://mirror.centos.org|baseurl=http://vault.centos.org|g' \ 4/etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-*.repo 3️⃣ 清缓存 1yum clean all 2yum makecache 🏁 最后建议（非常重要） 现在真的不太建议继续新装：
CentOS 7。
更推荐：
Rocky Linux 9 AlmaLinux 9 因为：
源正常 更新正常 Docker/K8s兼容更好 安全性更高 社区还活跃 🚀
title: centos7相关问题

【Hugo】Hugo + Github 免费部署自己的博客 使用hugo工具生成静态页面，然后在github上部署静态页面，来免费搭建自己的博客 提示 详细请查看链接 【Hugo + Github 免费部署自己的博客】
提示 视频地址 【Hugo + Github免费搭建博客，并实现自动化部署】
Using Hugo page bundles Page bundles are an optional way to organize page resources within Hugo.
You can opt-in to using page bundles in Hugo Clarity with usePageBundles in your site configuration or in a page's front matter. Read more about usePageBundles.
With page bundles, resources for a page or section, like images or attached files, live in the same directory as the content itself rather than in your static directory.
Hugo Clarity supports the use of leaf bundles, which are any directories within the content directory that contain an index.md file. Hugo's documentation gives this example:
1content 2├── about 3│ ├── index.md 4├── posts 5│ ├── my-post 6│ │ ├── content1.md 7│ │ ├── content2.md 8│ │ ├── image1.jpg 9│ │ ├── image2.png 10│ │ └── index.md 11│ └── my-other-post 12│ └── index.md 13│ 14└── another-section 15 ├── .. 16 └── not-a-leaf-bundle 17 ├── .. 18 └── another-leaf-bundle 19 └── index.md In the above example `content` directory, there are four leaf bundles: about: This leaf bundle is at the root level (directly under content directory) and has only the index.md.
my-post: This leaf bundle has the index.md, two other content Markdown files and two image files. image1 is a page resource of my-post and only available in my-post/index.md resources. image2 is a page resource of my-post and only available in my-post/index.md resources.
my-other-post: This leaf bundle has only the index.md.
another-leaf-bundle: This leaf bundle is nested under couple of directories. This bundle also has only the index.md.
The hierarchy depth at which a leaf bundle is created does not matter, as long as it is not inside another leaf bundle.
Advantages to using page bundles The image below is part of the bundle of this page, and is located at content/post/bundle/building.png. Because it's within this page's bundle, the markup for the image only has to specify the image's filename, building.png.
If you ever change the name of the directory in which this Markdown file and the image reside, the reference to the image would not need to be updated.
In addition to more cleanly organizing your content and related assets, when using page bundles, Hugo Clarity will automatically generate markup for modern image formats, which are smaller in file size.
For instance, when you reference an image like building.png, Hugo Clarity will check to see if the same image (based on filename) exists in WebP, AVIF or JXL formats. If you inspect the image above, you'll see a <source> element for building.webp, because that file is also present. Hugo Clarity will only include the markup if these images exist.
Browsers that support these formats and the <picture> element will load them, while browsers that do not will fall-back to the default image. Read more about this process.
Finally, note that page assets can be further managed and refined within the page's front matter if you wish, and are not limited to images alone.
Disadvantages to using page bundles Page resources in a bundle are only available to the page with which they are bundled — that means you can't include an image with one page and then reference it from another.
Images that are being used in multiple places are more appropriate for your Hugo assets directory. Unlike files in the Hugo static directory, files in the assets directory can be run through Hugo Pipes, which includes image processing.
Emoji Support Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.
The emojify function can be called directly in templates or Inline Shortcodes.
To enable emoji globally, set enableEmoji to true in your site's configuration and then you can type emoji shorthand codes directly in content files; e.g.
🙈 :see_no_evil: 🙉 :hear_no_evil: 🙊 :speak_no_evil:
The Emoji cheat sheet is a useful reference for emoji shorthand codes.
N.B. The above steps enable Unicode Standard emoji characters and sequences in Hugo, however the rendering of these glyphs depends on the browser and the platform. To style the emoji you can either use a third party emoji font or a font stack; e.g.
1.emoji { 2 font-family: Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, NotoColorEmoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Android Emoji, EmojiSymbols; 3} Using OpenStreetMap Markdown Syntax Guide This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
Headings The following HTML <h1>—<h6> elements represent six levels of section headings. <h1> is the highest section level while <h6> is the lowest.
H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 Paragraph Xerum, quo qui aut unt expliquam qui dolut labo. Quianimin porecus evelectur, cum que nis nust voloribus ratem aut omnimi, sitatur? Quiatem. Nam, omnis sum am facea corem alique molestrunt et eos evelece arcillit ut aut eos eos nus, sin conecerem erum fuga. Images Local image, alt text as caption The following image is located within the Hugo site. Because it has alt text but no title text, the caption is generated by the alt text.
Remote image, specified caption The following image is loaded from a remote URL. The alt text is the same (for screen readers and in cases when the image doesn't load) but because a separate title is provided, the title is used for the caption:
This is Jane Doe Image with alt text and no caption Alt text is always recommended for SEO, accessibility and in cases when images don't load. However, you don't necessarily always want an image to have a caption. In that case, use a title with one space:
Blockquotes The blockquote element represents content that is quoted from another source, optionally with a citation which must be within a footer or cite element, and optionally with in-line changes such as annotations and abbreviations.
Blockquote without attribution Tiam, ad mint andaepu dandae nostion secatur sequo quae. Note that you can use Markdown syntax within a blockquote.
Blockquote with attribution Don't communicate by sharing memory, share memory by communicating.
— Rob Pike1
Tables Tables aren't part of the core Markdown spec, but Hugo supports supports them out-of-the-box.
Name Age Bob 27 Alice 23 Inline Markdown within tables Italics Bold Code italics bold code Code Blocks Code block with backticks 1<!doctype html> 2<html lang="en"> 3<head> 4 <meta charset="utf-8"> 5 <title>Example HTML5 Document</title> 6</head> 7<body> 8 <p>Test</p> 9</body> 10<!-- this line is extraneous 2Error from server (Forbidden): deployments.apps is forbidden: User "chiptest" cannot create resource "deployments" in API group "apps" in the namespace "default" --> 11</html> Code block indented with four spaces <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <title>Example HTML5 Document</title> </head> <body> <p>Test</p> </body> </html> Code block with Hugo's internal highlight shortcode 1<!doctype html> 2<html lang="en"> 3<head> 4 <meta charset="utf-8"> 5 <title>Example HTML5 Document</title> 6</head> 7<body> 8 <p>Test</p> 9</body> 10</html> List Types Ordered List First item Second item Third item Unordered List List item Another item And another item Nested list Fruit Apple Orange Banana Dairy Milk Cheese Other Elements — abbr, sub, sup, kbd, mark GIF is a bitmap image format.

Most salamanders are nocturnal, and hunt for insects, worms, and other small creatures.
Math Typesettin Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.
In this example we will be using KaTeX
Create a partial under /layouts/partials/hooks/head-end.html Add these lines to the newly created partial: 1{{ if or .Params.math .Site.Params.math }} 2{{ partial "math.html" . }} 3{{ end }} To enable KaTeX globally set the parameter math to true in a project's configuration To enable KaTeX on a per page basis include the parameter math: true in content files Note: Use the online reference of Supported TeX Functions
Examples Inline math: \(\varphi = \dfrac{1+\sqrt5}{2}= 1.6180339887…\) Block math: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$
Using Notices The "Notices" shortcode enables you to call out pieces of information - sidebars, warnings, tips, etc.
To create a notice on a page, you can use the notice shortcode.
You use the notice shortcode, with the first parameter being one of note, info, tip, and warning. Then add a title for your note in quotes as the second parameter. The inner body of the note can be whatever markdown you want to create.
The following shortcode syntax within a markdown doc:
1{{% notice note "Note" %}} 2This is a standard "note" style. 3{{% /notice %}} will render as:
Note This is a standard "note" style.
The other three variants follow.
Info Here is the "info" style.
Tip Here is a "tip" variant of a notice.
Warning Here is the "warning" flavor of a notice.
Also note that the content of a notice can contain anything you could put on a normal page - as shown below:
Complex Notices are Possible! This is a notice that has a lot of various kinds of content in it.
Here is a bulleted list With more than one bullet And even more than one level Code blocks are fine here, too....
1public void SayHello() 2{ 3 Console.WriteLine("Hello, world!"); 4} Productivity Booster! If you're using VS Code for your editing, copy the .vscode\clarity.code-snippets file into a .vscode root folder on your repo. This will enable you to type note then <tab> then choose with up/down arrows which flavor notice you want, then <tab> again to provide a title, then <tab> to add your content!
To use the snippet, you need to first enable quickSuggestions for Markdown (one time only):
Go to Preferences->Settings then search for quickSuggestions Follow the link to Edit in settings.json Toward the bottom of the file, paste in the following JSON: 1"[markdown]": { 2 "editor.quickSuggestions": true 3 } Close and save the settings.
